title: pteroselinum chabraei
intro: Pteroselinum chabraei, also known as Himalayan fern, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Pteroselinum chabraei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal supplements and remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
